name: Lamb & Cabbage Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb white cabbage, cored and thinly sliced
Thin round-bone shoulder-lamb chops, trimmed but with some fat.
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly salt the lamb chops, preferably about an hour before you plan to cook them.
2. Oil a heavy casserole that can be placed on top of the stove and is just wide enough to hold two chops.
3. Place two chops in the casserole and sprinkle with flour.
4. Add a 1/2 to 1-inch layer of cabbage, sprinkle with salt and then flour, and dot with butter.
5. Continue making layers, ending with cabbage and a little butter.
6. Pour hot water over the top.
7. Tie the peppercorns securely in cheesecloth and lightly bruise them with a rolling pin or pestle and mortar. Place them in a metal spice-holding ball and bury them in the casserole.
8. Cover and bring to a boil.
9. Immediately lower the heat and simmer gently for about 1 1/2 hours, until the meat is very tender and the cabbage almost melted.
10. Remove the peppercorns. Serve with boiled potatoes.
